feedback.technicalIssues: I did not encounter any technical issues during this study.
feedback.confusingParts: I did not find any part of this experiment to be confusing.
feedback.suggestions: I do not think that this study needs to be changed in any way. I think that this study is fine the way it currently is and doesn't need to be changed in any way because of that.
feedback.funCriteria: I decided whether a game was fun or not based on how the game is controlled (what keys you can press and the types of actions that you can do based on the keys that you press) and also based on how interesting I thought the objective of the game is.
